markers.evidence_type: encodes CD161, innate lymphocyte marker, scRNA-seq

other_findings.finding: ILC2 has the most distinct signature among ILC clusters in Reynolds 2021 data and existing literature
ILC2_3 in Gopee 2024 is a combined cluster encompassing both ILC2 and ILC1/3 populations
Fetal skin ILCs (IL7R+, RORC+ and KIT+) resemble adult skin ILC3
ILC2 produces type 2 cytokines (IL-5, IL-13) in response to TSLP, IL-25 and IL-33

evidence_quotes.quote: ILC2 (IL7R, PTGDR2, GATA3) has the most distinct signature in our data and in existing literature
Fetal skin ILCs (IL7R+, RORC+ and KIT+) resemble adult skin ILC3
